channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: 8 New Songs Out Today
item.description: 🎶 Fresh tunes alert! 8 new songs dropping today to add to your playlist rotation 🎧 Let's vibe! #NewMusicFriday #MusicNews

item.title: Metallica Expand Sphere Residency to 20 Shows
item.description: 🔥 Metallica takes over Vegas! 🤘🎸 More shows added to their epic residency! Are you ready to rock with them? #MetallicaMadness

item.title: ‘Let Me Go to Work’: Harry Styles Preps Live Debut of His New Album in ‘One Night in Manchester’ Trailer
item.description: 🌟 Harry Styles is bringing the party to Manchester with his live debut! 🎶 Who's ready to groove with him? 🎉 #HarryStyles #OneNightInManchester

item.title: Goose’s Viva El Gonzo Festival Is a Choose Your Own Adventure Wonderland
item.description: Dive into the whimsical world of Goose at Viva El Gonzo Festival 🎶✨ Adventure awaits! #MusicFestivals #GooseBand

item.title: Arlo Parks announces North American tour
item.description: Arlo Parks is hitting the road! 🎶🚗 Who's ready for a vibe-filled tour across North America? 🌟 #ArloParksTour
